title: CPE Opportunities to Maintain ISC2 Certifications
description: Stay current with Continuing Professional Education! Increase your knowledge of the everchanging cybersecurity landscape. Find ways to earn CPE credits.
text: CPE Opportunities Explore the many resources available to you as a valued member. Our members are integral to our vision and we’re always looking for ways to enhance your membership experience through a wealth of professional resources, programs, benefits and services. Earning Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits not only streamlines the certification renewal process but also ensures that you remain current and consistently expand your knowledge in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity. This, in turn, can bolster the overall security and protection of the organization(s) you serve and enhance your career prospects, as many employers highly value professionals who demonstrate a consistent commitment to their personal development. CPE and Certification Maintenance Resources Certification Maintenance Handbook English | Chinese | Japanese | German | Spanish CPE Credits Guide English | Chinese | Japanese | German | Spanish CPE Tutorials Top 10 CPE Credit Tips to Maintain Your Certification Managing Your ISC2 CPE Credits and Activities Membership Guide Webinars All CPE Opportunities Events On-Demand Learning Certification Exam Prep Volunteering & Networking Research & Publications ISC2 Certificates Each ISC2 Certificate turns a laser focus on the subject matter. EARN UP TO 76 CPE CREDITS ISC2 Courses Demonstrate your knowledge of the latest cybersecurity principles and best practices. EARN UP TO 111 CPE CREDITS ISC2 Express Courses Grow what you know with short-format learning designed to fit your busy schedule. EARN UP TO 26 CPE CREDITS ISC2 Webinars Members earn CPE credits – live and/or on-demand. EARN 1 CPE CREDIT PER WEBINAR Online Self-Paced Training Prepare for your next ISC2 certification exam at your own pace. EARN UP TO 40 CPE CREDITS Online Instructor-Led Training Combines convenience and flexibility for your busy schedule with easy access to an ISC2 Authorized Instructor. EARN UP TO 40 CPE CREDITS Classroom-Based Training Hands-on learning in a traditional environment with an authorized ISC2-certified instructor and other students. EARN UP TO 40 CPE CREDITS Center for Cyber Safety and Education Volunteer through our charitable foundation. EARN CPE CREDITS FOR VOLUNTEERING ISC2 Chapters Join your local network of peers to share knowledge, exchange resources and collaborate on projects. EARN UP TO 1 CPE CREDIT PER HOUR FOR ATTENDING MEETINGS SME & Content Development Use your cybersecurity expertise to help ISC2 develop content. EARN CPE CREDITS Committee Work Advocate for your community. EARN CPE CREDITS FOR CONTRIBUTING YOUR TIME Exam Development Create and update exam questions. EARN UP TO 21 CPE CREDITS Security Congress Attend the year’s flagship gathering. EARN 85+ CPE CREDITS SECURE Events Local events provide practical and timely advice to cybersecurity leaders, managers and practitioners impacting their local region. EARN CPE CREDITS FOR ATTENDING AI Workshops Meet likeminded AI security enthusiasts. EARN 16 CPE CREDITS PER WORKSHOP ISC2 Spotlight Attend virtually. EARN CPE CREDITS Partner Industry Events Explore endorsed industry events. EARN CPE CREDITS FOR ATTENDING CPE Partners Leading security organizations and technology innovators that help members on their path of professional development while earning CPE credits. EARN CPE CREDITS FOR EVENTS & ACTIVITIES Insights CPE Quiz Submit articles year-round for consideration by the content development team. EARN 2 CPE CREDITS PER QUIZ ISC2 Research Read about industry trends. EARN CPE CREDITS “ISC2’s bite-sized Express Courses have been instrumental in bolstering my knowledge and understanding in specialized areas like Cloud Security, Zero Trust and Supply Chain Management.” ISC2 member “ISC2 membership has not only boosted my credentials as a cybersecurity professional but also provided access to a network of experts and CPE resources that continue to enrich my professional journey.” ISC2 member “The continuous learning resources developed by ISC2, ranging from webinars to workshops and events, have been instrumental in keeping me updated on the latest trends and advancements in cybersecurity and helped expand my professional circle.” ISC2 member “ISC2's efforts to provide members with information, training, and continuous learning tools is invaluable. In our ever-evolving world, where threats and dangers are constantly changing, it is crucial to stay informed and continually learn about these developments. The fact that we can earn CPE credits in the process is a bonus!” ISC2 member “The professional development CPE resources have not only kept me updated with the latest industry trends but have also helped me refine my skills and stay ahead of the curve. Networking through ISC2 has opened doors to invaluable connections, collaborations, and mentorship opportunities that I wouldn't have accessed otherwise. Volunteering with ISC2 has allowed me to give back to the community while honing my leadership and teamwork skills.” ISC2 member
quote_candidates: CPE Opportunities Explore the many resources available to you as a valued member.
Our members are integral to our vision and we’re always looking for ways to enhance your membership experience through a wealth of professional resources, programs, benefits and services.

Earning Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits not only streamlines the certification renewal process but also ensures that you remain current and consistently expand your knowledge in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.

This, in turn, can bolster the overall security and protection of the organization(s) you serve and enhance your career prospects, as many employers highly value professionals who demonstrate a consistent commitment to their personal development.
